creator: jkim@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 226142
Honor CPUTYPE instead of forcing '-march=native' on x86

We always build it with "-march=native" for x86 but we should honor CPUTYPE.  With the attached patch, we can build it on one CPU and run it on another.  Also, I removed a hack to force disabling SSE 4.2 on i386 because I believe this patch should naturally fix the problem.
